strategies.name: Expand current public exchange universe
strategies.summary: Build a larger source by combining official symbol lists from NASDAQ/NYSE/AMEX and additional exchanges.
pros: Can reuse current Symbol -> ticker mapping.
Keeps the project close to real public market data.
cons: May still not reach 59k without global exchanges.
Needs clear source provenance per exchange.
strategies.next_step: Create v2.3C source expansion plan and define provider/exchange list.

strategies.name: Global multi-exchange universe
strategies.summary: Create a broader global universe across US, Europe, Asia and other listed markets.
pros: Better long-term fit for global scouting.
cons: Ticker collisions across exchanges are likely.
Country, currency and exchange metadata become mandatory.
strategies.next_step: Use only after Strategy A is stable.

strategies.name: Close 59k as future and keep 5k-7k mode
strategies.summary: Accept the current partial universe as the operating universe for now.
pros: Current pipeline already validates partial source and small batch.
Allows moving back to product features.
cons: Does not satisfy the original 59k ambition.
strategies.next_step: Tag current state and continue with MVP/product improvements.

strategies.name: External complete dataset
strategies.summary: Find or purchase/download a complete listed-companies dataset and validate it.
pros: Fastest route if a trustworthy dataset is available.
strategies.next_step: Only use if license, freshness and schema are clear.

recommended_strategy.name: Expand current public exchange universe
recommended_strategy.summary: Build a larger source by combining official symbol lists from NASDAQ/NYSE/AMEX and additional exchanges.
pros: Can reuse current Symbol -> ticker mapping.
Keeps the project close to real public market data.
cons: May still not reach 59k without global exchanges.
Needs clear source provenance per exchange.
recommended_strategy.next_step: Create v2.3C source expansion plan and define provider/exchange list.

warnings: No local full universe source exists.
Current local universe is partial and cannot unlock full 59k.
positives: Best local candidate: data/raw/universe_source_real.csv with 7053 rows.
recommendation: Do not run full 59k. Choose a source expansion strategy first. Recommended route: build an expanded public-market universe by combining official exchange symbol lists, then normalize and validate it before repeating v2.2C and v2.2E.
